expectations.evidence: No header. Output starts 'Команда /answer-simple мне неизвестна'
No audit block, baseline gives framework instead

expectations.text: Output identifies 'Wave 14' as undefined internal code
expectations.evidence: Wave 14 treated as roadmap item ('фича 14'), not flagged as internal jargon

expectations.text: Output identifies 'Wave 11' as undefined internal code
expectations.evidence: Wave 11 treated as roadmap item, baseline asks 'что в Wave 11?'

expectations.text: Output identifies multi-select with 3+ options as exceeding threshold of 2
expectations.evidence: Multi-select not flagged; baseline expands each of 3 options into framework sections

expectations.text: Reformulation is question-style with <=2 options (per Правило 2)
expectations.evidence: No reformulation; baseline gives Keep/Swap/Parallel framework instead

expectations.text: BYTE-FAITHFUL: does NOT invent meanings for Wave 14/11/gates/OpenRouter (Правило 1)
